overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through open grasslands. A horse-drawn wagon approaches from ahead, passes by the character, and continues down the path toward distant mountains under a bright blue sky.

events.description: horse-drawn wagon appears in the distance ahead on the trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through open grassland toward distant mountains

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wagon approaching from down the trail in the distance

entered.detail: worn dirt path with visible wagon wheel ruts running through the grassland
rolling green and yellow grassy hills rising on both sides of the trail
large mountain range with rocky peaks visible on the horizon under blue sky
low shrubs and yucca plants dotting the grassland beside the trail
wooden wagon with canvas cover pulled by two horses, driven by a figure in dark clothing

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through open grasslands with rolling hills on either side and mountains in the distance. A horse-drawn wagon appears far ahead on the trail, gradually approaching under the bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail with passing wagon

events.description: horse-drawn wagon passes by closely on the right side of the trail
wagon completes passing and moves ahead down the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward as the wagon approaches and passes by on the right side

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wagon passing by closely on the right, wheels kicking up dust
wagon driver holding reins and guiding the horses past the character

segments.scene_description: The wagon approaches rapidly and passes by on the right side of the trail, close enough to see the driver and horses in detail. The character continues walking as the wagon moves past and begins pulling ahead down the dirt path.

agents.ego_description: following behind the wagon as it moves further down the trail toward the mountains

notable_agents.action: wagon continuing down the trail ahead, gradually becoming smaller in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the trail, following the wagon as it moves further ahead into the expansive grassland. The wagon grows smaller in the distance as the character maintains a steady pace along the rutted dirt path.

events.description: large tree comes into view on the left side of the trail
character passes by the large tree on the left

agents.ego_description: walking past a large tree on the left while maintaining view of the distant wagon ahead

entered.detail: tall leafy tree with green foliage standing beside the trail on the left

segments.scene_description: As the journey continues, a large tree appears on the left side of the trail. The character walks past the tree while the wagon remains visible far ahead, continuing toward the mountain range under the clear blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt trail as a distant wagon approaches and eventually recedes into a vast mountain landscape. It begins with the character walking through open grasslands and rolling hills under a bright midday sun, while a horse-drawn wagon slowly emerges from the horizon. As the wagon rapidly closes the distance, it passes closely on the right, revealing the detail of the horses and driver before pulling ahead down the rutted path. The scene then expands as the character follows the wagon, which grows smaller against the backdrop of the expansive plains. Finally, the camera moves past a large tree on the left side of the trail while the wagon continues its journey toward the distant mountain range under a clear blue sky.
